feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Ecological modelling of hycean worlds
entry.content:
Authors: GJ Cooke, N Madhusudhan, EG Mitchell - arXiv preprint arXiv:2603.22491, 2026

Abstract: New observations are opening the possibility of characterising habitable environments in exoplanetary systems, with the recent example of the candidate hycean world K2-18 b. This motivates an exploration of the possible ecological ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Nikku Madhusudhan (author alert)

entry.title: Abstract A061: Longitudinal multimodal profiling of IDH-wildtype glioblastoma reveals the molecular evolution and cellular phenotypes underlying prognostically ...
entry.content:
Authors: CH Lucas, N Al-Adli, J Young, R Gupta, R Morshed... - Cancer Research, 2026

Abstract: Background: Despite recent advances in the biology of IDH-wildtype glioblastoma, it remains a devastating disease with median survival of less than two years. However, the molecular underpinnings of the heterogeneous response to the current standard ...

Alert: Edward F Chang (author alert)

entry.title: Abstract A043: Genomically-tailored multi-agent precision medicine clinical trial for adults with recurrent glioblastoma
entry.content:
Authors: DA Solomon, E Chen, NA Oberheim Bush... - Cancer Research, 2026

Abstract: Background: Existing salvage therapies for recurrent glioblastoma (rGBM) have limited efficacy, with median survival of approximately 9 months. Given the complex molecular heterogeneity of GBM, single-target approaches have consistently failed ...

Alert: Edward F Chang (author alert)

entry.title: Classification and Characterization of Thick Disk and Halo Low Mass Stars in Deep JWST Surveys
entry.content:
Authors: E Pritchard, M Loritsch, J Haynes, S Morrissey... - ... Society Meeting Abstracts, 2026

Abstract: With the launch of The James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) our ability to discover faint near infrared sources, including dim objects within our Milky Way such as very low mass stars and brown dwarfs, has greatly improved. Historically, these objects ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Adam J. Burgasser (author alert)

entry.title: Cross-diffusion and fast-reaction in pattern formation: a structural analysis
entry.content:
Authors: E Brocchieri, C Soresina

Journal: 2026

Abstract: Cross-diffusion systems play a central role in mathematical modelling, in which density-dependent dispersal and multiscale mechanisms can lead to spatial segregation and diffusion-driven instabilities. In several relevant examples, including ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: Cinzia Soresina (author alert)

entry.title: Coronal dimmings as diagnostics of the May 2024 solar energetic events
entry.content:
Authors: A Razquin, AM Veronig, K Dissauer, G Barnes...

Journal: 2026

Abstract: Coronal dimmings are regions of transiently reduced extreme ultraviolet (EUV) and soft X-ray (SXR) emission caused by plasma evacuation during the liftoff of coronal mass ejections (CMEs). As such, they serve as powerful diagnostics of CME initiation ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Language, Numeracy, and Musicality

Alert: Astrid Veronig (author alert)

entry.title: Studying the connection between coronal dimmings and flux rope footpoints using data-driven modelling and observations
entry.content:
Authors: A Wagner, A Razquin, A Veronig, K Dissauer...

Journal: 2026

Abstract: Studying the structure of solar active regions through magnetic field modelling and observations strengthens our understanding of eruptive phenomena in the solar atmosphere. AR12975 featured an interesting event, where a significant restructuring ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Language, Numeracy, and Musicality

Alert: Astrid Veronig (author alert)

entry.title: Tracing Magnetic Helicity from the Solar Source Region to Interplanetary Space: A Multi-Spacecraft Analysis of the March 23, 2024 ICME
entry.content:
Authors: A Moulin, J Thalmann, A Veronig, M Dumbović...

Journal: 2026

Abstract: Recent multi-spacecraft observations show the complex structure of Interplanetary Coronal Mass Ejections (ICMEs) as they propagate through interplanetary space. These observations allow us to monitor magnetic-field-related parameters ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Language, Numeracy, and Musicality

Alert: Astrid Veronig (author alert)
